what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG outline icon depicting a send or paper-plane shape using currentColor stroke styling.
observations: Uses an inline SVG root with xmlns and viewBox="0 0 24 24".
Sets fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so the icon is unfilled and inherits color from its context.
Uses stroke-width="1.5" with round line caps and joins.
Contains two path elements: one for the outer paper-plane shape and one diagonal internal line.
conventions: Follows outline-icon SVG conventions with no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded caps, and rounded joins.
Uses explicit path data rather than reusable symbols, groups, or external references.
Does not include embedded accessibility metadata such as title, role, or aria attributes.
concerns: No embedded title or accessibility attributes if this SVG is used standalone.
notes: A small currentColor outline SVG for a send/paper-plane action icon.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be handled inside this SVG or by the consuming component?
Is the icon intended to be decorative or semantically announced when rendered?
purpose_vs_actual: The file name and SVG content align: it defines a send-style paper-plane icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable UI icon for send-related actions while inheriting color from its rendering context.
contribution: Provides a compact, theme-color vector representation of a send action that can be retained as a reusable icon asset.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor outline SVG send icon made from two path elements forming a paper-plane shape.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a send action in a design system or UI icon set with inherited stroke color.
